title: /mini:security slash command
goal: Add an idempotent /mini:security slash command — a 'security' entry in COMMAND_DEFS plus a 'mini context security' route that reuses the existing security-review context builder and range target — mirroring /mini:adversarial-project, so the security review can be launched inline from a Claude Code session.

steps.title: Security context builder (resolve + build)
steps.detail: In securityReviewContext.ts add exported buildSecurityContext(cwd, input) combining resolveSecurityTarget + buildSecurityReviewContext, returning string|null (null on range/no-phase error, reason already logged; mirrors buildProjectAdversarialContext). Refactor CLI security() to reuse it so resolve+build is not duplicated.

steps.title: Route security in mini context
steps.detail: Add 'security' to CONTEXT_COMMANDS and an else-if branch in context() calling the new builder with range. Update the context command description to note range flags apply to security too. Verifiable: mini context security prints a prompt for the last phase; invalid range exits 1 with empty stdout.

steps.title: security entry in COMMAND_DEFS + usage hint
steps.detail: New CommandDef mirroring adversarial-project: name security, argumentHint, body running 'mini context security $ARGUMENTS' with independence note and the no-flags=last-phase note. Add /mini:security to the usage hint in install-commands.ts. Verifiable: renderCommandMd produces a valid .md.

steps.title: Tests
steps.detail: Add context.test.ts tests for security routing (prompt to stdout; range error -> exit 1, empty stdout) modeled on the adversarial-project tests. Cover security presence in COMMAND_DEFS / render snapshot in commands.test.ts. Cover the builder null path.

steps.title: Build + run
steps.detail: typecheck + full test suite green; manually verify mini context security (default last phase and --from-phase/--to-phase). Confirm doctor expectedCommands (COMMAND_DEFS.length) still matches.
